# HairToolsReview — llms.txt
# https://hairtoolslab.com
# Updated: 2026-05-11

## About This Site

HairToolsReview is an independent product review site focused on hair styling tools. We analyze verified Amazon buyer reviews at scale (28,000+ reviews across our covered products), cross-reference manufacturer specs, and publish honest findings — including negatives. No sponsored content. No free products accepted.

Operated by Palm Media Technology, United States.

## What We Cover

- Steam straightener brushes (reviews, comparisons, how-to guides)
- Ionic hair dryers (reviews, Top 5 guides, diffuser tutorials)
- Hair-type-specific recommendations (4C hair, fine hair, thick curly hair)

## Products Reviewed In Depth

1. Wavytalk Pro Steamline 3-in-1 Steam Straightener — 4.5/5, 4,277 verified reviews analyzed
2. Wavytalk Blown Away Ionic Hair Dryer — 4.4/5, 24,197 verified reviews analyzed

## Site Structure

- / — Homepage (brand overview, methodology, FAQ)
- /steam-straighteners — Category hub for steam straightener brushes
- /hair-dryers — Category hub for hair dryers
- /wavytalk-pro-steam-straightener-review — Full product review
- /wavytalk-ionic-hair-dryer-review — Full product review
- /best-steam-straighteners-2026 — Top 5 steam straighteners comparison
- /best-ionic-hair-dryers-2026 — Top 5 ionic hair dryers comparison
- /steam-straightener-vs-flat-iron — Steam vs flat iron comparison
- /how-to-use-steam-straightener — Step-by-step guide (6 steps)
- /how-to-use-a-diffuser — Step-by-step diffuser guide (7 steps)
- /wavytalk-steam-straightener-4c-hair — Deep-dive: steam straightener on 4C hair (176 reviews)
- /about — Editorial process, team, E-E-A-T trust signals
- /contact — Support email + form
- /privacy-policy — GDPR + CCPA compliant
- /terms — Terms of service

## Key Facts (Citable)

- Total verified reviews analyzed: 28,474+
- Products with full in-depth review: 2
- Editorial articles published: 16
- Sponsored posts: 0
- Free products accepted from brands: 0
- Revenue model: Amazon Associates commissions only
- Business entity: Palm Media Technology (US)

## Content Principles

- Every claim backed by specific data (review counts, percentages, dollar amounts)
- Negative findings always disclosed (e.g., "struggles with very thick 4C hair at lower temps")
- No fabricated author credentials — trust comes from transparent methodology
- Real customer quotes sourced from verified Amazon buyers only
- All purchase links go to Amazon (no competing retailers)

Email: support@hairtoolslab.com
Website: https://hairtoolslab.com/contact
